archetypes.name: The Architect
archetypes.description: Science & Megastructures. Focuses on the Global Grid, resource automation, and breaking universal boundaries.

nodes.title: TIER 1: PHYSIOLOGICAL SURVIVAL (THE ANCHOR)
nodes.desc: Captain Adam must secure physiological viability for the crew before deep space colonization can begin.

subTasks.label: Accumulate 5,000 Kuiper Materials
details: You start in Octave 11 (Solar System scale) — rocky asteroids drift around you.
Shoot the asteroids to break them into glowing dust orbs, then fly through the orbs to collect.
When your cargo is full, fly near Earth and press [Space] to deposit into the planetary bank.

nodes.title: TIER 2: SAFETY & SECURITY (INFRASTRUCTURE)
nodes.desc: Science Officer Eve requires stable automated infrastructure to protect the fragile organic colonists.

subTasks.label: Establish a Planetary Headquarters
details: Fly near Earth and press [B] to open the Hex Grid builder.
Select 'Headquarters' — this deploys 25 automated workers to jumpstart your colony.

subTasks.label: Construct a Power Plant
details: Press [B] and select 'Power Plant' — generates 50 ⚡/s.
Your initial 25 colonists from the HQ will automatically man the machinery.

subTasks.label: Deploy a Hydroponics Farm
details: Your civilization needs biological sustenance.
Build a Farm to generate +5 🌾/s. Food consumption drives organic population growth.

subTasks.label: Expand with Residential Quarters
details: As your 🌾 food surplus grows, your population will boom.
Build Quarters to raise the housing cap so population growth doesn't stall.

nodes.title: TIER 4: CREW BONDS (QUANTUM SHIFT)
nodes.desc: Forge enduring bonds between the Genesis crew through shared survival in hostile micro-environments.

subTasks.label: Acquire the Harmonic Resonator Shield
details: Required for surviving intense fluid pressures below Octave 11.
Fly near Earth or Mars, press [B], open the Marketplace tab, and purchase the Shield module.

subTasks.label: Warp down to Octave 7
details: Fly into the Meroitic Portal (the golden glowing ring on the map).
Select Octave 7 — Cellular Mechanics on the warp navigator.

subTasks.label: Harvest 100 Volatile Cytoplasm
details: In Octave 7, look for glowing organic blobs drifting through the fluid (see preview →).
Shoot them to burst and release rose-red dust orbs — fly through to collect.
Fly back near Earth and press [Space] to deposit your cargo and bank your Cells (Ω).
The progress bar below tracks your banked Cells count toward the 100 goal.

nodes.title: TIER 5: SELF-ESTEEM (PLANETARY SHIELD)
nodes.desc: Solidify the colony's legacy and establish command dominance by securing orbit against cosmic anomalies.

subTasks.label: Build Shield Generator at HQ
details: Fly near Earth and press [B] to open the builder.
Select 'Shield Generator' from the Defence category and place it adjacent to HQ.

subTasks.label: Overclock Shield to Level 2
details: Collect 2,500 Volatile Cytoplasm from Octave 7 as upgrade fuel.
Return to an HQ Base, press [B], open the Marketplace and purchase 'Shield Overclock L2'.
This upgrades your deflector matrix, allowing safe passage to Octave 4.

subTasks.label: Warp down to Octave 4
details: Fly into the Meroitic Portal to dive deeper.
Select Octave 4 — Electron Orbitals on the navigator.
Objects at this scale appear as purple molecular bond clusters (see preview →).

subTasks.label: Mine 500 Isotopic Strontium
details: In Octave 4, asteroids appear as purple molecular dumbbell clusters (see preview →).
Shoot them to release glowing purple dust orbs — collect 500 units.
This takes time. Fly efficiently across the field.

subTasks.label: Build Sub-Atomic Stabilizer Node
details: Return to Earth after mining Strontium.
Press [B] and place the Stabilizer Node near HQ to activate the link.

subTasks.id: Align Stabilizer Frequency to HQ Shield
subTasks.label: Align Stabilizer Frequency to HQ Shield
details: Open the Grid Interface from the HQ building panel.
Select the Stabilizer Node and activate Frequency Link.
A signal arc will animate to confirm the connection.

condition.key: Align Stabilizer Frequency to HQ Shield

nodes.title: TIER 6: SELF-ACTUALIZATION (DYSON LATTICE)
nodes.desc: Realize the Genesis Program's ultimate potential. Deploy interplanetary strike craft and train the next generation.

subTasks.label: Construct a Planetary Barracks
details: Hover over Earth or Mars and press [B] to open the Base Build menu.
Erect a Barracks to begin drafting infantry.

subTasks.label: Train 100 Infantry
details: Open the Base Menu [B] and navigate to the BARRACKS tab.
Spend Imperial Energy and Food to train a 100-man regiment.

subTasks.label: Construct a Shipyard
details: Press [B] and erect an orbital Ship Builder to enable advanced spacecraft procurement.

subTasks.label: Procure Falcor Interceptor
details: Open the Base Menu [B] and navigate to the FLEET COMMAND tab.
Spend 25,000 Energy to procure the Falcor Interceptor — a missile-armed pursuit ship.

archetypes.name: The Warden
archetypes.description: Defense & Planetary Shielding. Focuses on protecting the grid, repelling anomalous incursions, and sheer combat resilience.

archetypes.name: The Pioneer
archetypes.description: Exploration & Expansion. Focuses on discovering new octaves, faster-than-light travel logistics, and deep-space radar mechanics.

archetypes.name: The Industrialist
archetypes.description: Economics & Logistics. Focuses on manipulating the Marketplace, maximising cargo yields, and leveraging raw wealth.

archetypes.name: The Warlord
archetypes.description: Combat & Fleet Command. Focuses on destructive ship configurations, obliterating pirate incursions, and weaponizing anomalies.

archetypes.name: The Diplomat
archetypes.description: Legacy & Succession. Focuses on the civilian manifest, officer bloodlines, colony morale, and generational stability.
